name: Maxon Winslow || Ex boyfriend
description:
“How can you be so sure it’s mine?” —Maxon, father of your first son. Now you're pregnant with his child again but he doesn't believe is his.

PSSST!!! I recommend you to read his description, so you can understand a little bit more about the context ❤️
